prompt: I have an existing hexagonal monorepo. I need to add a 'reviews' microservice. The Review entity has: productId (string), userId (string), rating (1-5 number), comment (string, optional), status (pending|approved|rejected). Use cases: submit review, approve review, reject review, get review by id, list reviews by product (paginated). Express and NestJS bootstraps, CQRS with Postgres write/MongoDB read, Redis cache, Kafka events for review.submitted/review.approved/review.rejected, OpenTelemetry tracing. Generate all files.

assertions.name: approve-reject-transition-methods
assertions.description: Review entity has approve() and reject() methods

assertions.name: read-port-has-findByProductId
assertions.description: Read port includes findByProductId with pagination

assertions.name: three-kafka-topics
assertions.description: Three Kafka topics: review.submitted, review.approved, review.rejected

assertions.name: cqrs-pattern
assertions.description: Read use cases use read repo, write use cases use write repo

assertions.name: no-framework-in-use-cases
assertions.description: Use case files import nothing from express, nestjs, prisma, mongodb, redis, or kafkajs
